title: Conserved power, energy saving, i r sensors & circuits for automatic urinal flushings/wc flushings and auto taps (faucets) which runs upto 3.5 million cycles
abstract: Active IR sensor with conserved powered energy saving runs up to 3.5 million cycles, using periodical power consumption and sleep mode technology. Our IR rays emits for 1 micro sec consuming 50 micro-amps current, at intervals of 5 sec which is in sleep mode, where there is no emission. During non-operational mode, in 1 minute, only 12 micro-sec is in use for emission of IR rays. Power consumption during this period is 12 micro-sec x 50 micro-Amp i.e. 0.000012 x 0.00005=0.0000000006 Amp During operational-mode, 1 cycle of ON & OFF consumes, 100 mA for 1 micro-sec each, so one cycle it consumes 0.1 Amp x 0.00000=0.0000001 Amp current+(OFF=0.0000001) Total=0.0000002 Amp Therefore for 3.5 million cycle it will consume 0.0000002x3500000=0.7 AH Current Total power consumption includes, operational mode + periodical operating+sleep+self discharge etc. which is far less than 8.5 AH Hence it has got huge energy saving.
claims: Claims CLAIMS LAIM THAT, 1. IR Active sensor / circuits which has got periodical emission of I R rays for 1 micro sec at the interval of 5 sec, hence power consumption is very much less. Since after every 1 micro sec emission, system goes in sleep mode for 5 sec, at that time there is no power consumption, during nonâ operational condition. We have developed detail programming for the same. 2. Can use any type of battery of 3.6 volt having less selfâ discharge rate and with high energy density, so LISocl2 (Lithium thionyl chloride battery with 8500 mAH energy and self discharge rate in less than 1% per year is best suited for us. 3. During operational condition, when the solenoid valve opens our system consume 100 mA current for 1 micro sec and during the closing of the solenoid valve it consume 100 mA for 1 micro sec. Therefore, in total 100 mA current is consumed for 2 micro sec to complete one cycle. Hence my claim, all my sensor based products like Auto Urinal Flushing, W C flushing and Auto Taps (Faucets) will runs upto 305 million cycle. 4. Because of uniformity in power supply, there are little or no chance of electronic parts getting damaged. 5. Our solenoid valves will be with inbuilt aerator, so we can save at least 40% water, compare to normal battery or electrical operated system.
